title: justicia pallida
intro: Justicia pallida, also known as pale shankhua or pale snakeweed, is a plant species in the family Acanthaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Justicia pallida include its potential to treat skin conditions, wounds, and fever, as well as its use as a diuretic and to treat digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Justicia pallida can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
